characters.name: Acrobats
characters.description: The Acrobats are two lobsters that appear inThe New Year's Dragon!. They love to practice at a parade for meeting theBubbletuckycrowdwatches. They are acrobats who perform for the New Year's parade. They do flips, throwing and catching each other. When there were not enough dancers for the Dragon Dance, Ming began to panic.Deemaasked what's wrong, and he tells her they need six people for the dance. Deema then says that the Guppies can do it, since they are six people and are 'the best swishers and swooshers this side of Bubbletucky. The Guppies then do the New Year's Dragon Dance.

characters.name: Acrobats

characters.name: Adults
characters.description: Adults are characters from the Bubble Guppies. They love the Bubble Guppies, and enjoy having fun with them. They appear in some episodes or only one episode of Bubble Guppies. Some of the adults on the show are:

characters.name: Adults
characters.description: Adults are characters from the Bubble Guppies. They love the Bubble Guppies, and enjoy having fun with them. They appear in some episodes or only one episode of Bubble Guppies. Some of the adults on the show are:

characters.name: Agnes
characters.description: Agnes is an orange dragon which appears in the episodeDragons N' Roses!. Similar to many dragons in the series, she has a large body with small wings. In the story, she scares the people in the kingdom with her loud roars. Then,Zoolivisits her and makes friends with her.

characters.name: Agnes
characters.description: Agnes is an orange dragon which appears in the episodeDragons N' Roses!. Similar to many dragons in the series, she has a large body with small wings. In the story, she scares the people in the kingdom with her loud roars. Then,Zoolivisits her and makes friends with her.

characters.name: Alien
characters.description: The Space Monster(as he is referred to in the episode), is the antagonist in the Space Alien Chase storybook segment in the episodeThe Moon Rocks!Because of his appearance and his inability to be understood, he is perceived as threatening. However, he was only tired and in determined need of a nap. characters.name: Animals
characters.description: Animals are animal characters from Bubble Guppies. They only appear in some episodes or an episode. They love to play, having fun, and learn from the adults and the kids. Like theAdultsand theKids, they love the Bubble Guppies. Some of the animals who appeared on some episodes and an episode are:

characters.name: Announcer
characters.description: The Announceris a one-time character fromBubble Guppies. He is a lobster who appears in "Fishketball!" He announces the game ofFishketball, alongsideClamwhile the Bubble Guppies are playing. The Announcer is a lobster who is all red with big sharp red pinchers.

characters.name: Arctic Dan
characters.description: Arctic Danis a character who appears in "The Arctic Life!. He sells snow cones and dresses up as a polar bear to promote his job. While in costume, he accidentally scares Gil. He also appears inParty at Sea!andThe New Doghouse!. characters.name: Audience
characters.description: The Audienceare characters from Bubble Guppies. They make several episode appearances. They love to watch games, marching bands, parades, parties, rock bands, celebrations and more. Sometimes the audience could be doing a wave. They were voiced by Gary Anthony Williams, Chris Phillips. Kari Wahlgren, Nick Balaban, Micheal Rubin, Ashley Albert, Doug Preis. They meet the characters in background sightings:

characters.name: Audience
characters.description: The Audienceare characters from Bubble Guppies. They make several episode appearances. They love to watch games, marching bands, parades, parties, rock bands, celebrations and more. Sometimes the audience could be doing a wave. They were voiced by Gary Anthony Williams, Chris Phillips. Kari Wahlgren, Nick Balaban, Micheal Rubin, Ashley Albert, Doug Preis. They meet the characters in background sightings:

characters.name: Avi
characters.description: Aviis a small blue fish, and is one of Oona's best friends. He loves to ride around on his orange tricycle, but his opinion may have changed after he fell after hitting a rock and broke his tail.Oonawas very worried about Avi, and to make Oona and Avi feel better,Mr. Groupertook theBubble Guppiesto visit him in the hospital. Oona was also worried about him inGet Ready For School!when it was his first day of school, but they visited him after school and found out that he enjoyed it. In the pop song of this episode, it is revealed that Avi can play the drums! Oonahugging Avi

characters.name: Avi
characters.description: Aviis a small blue fish, and is one of Oona's best friends. He loves to ride around on his orange tricycle, but his opinion may have changed after he fell after hitting a rock and broke his tail.Oonawas very worried about Avi, and to make Oona and Avi feel better,Mr. Groupertook theBubble Guppiesto visit him in the hospital. Oona was also worried about him inGet Ready For School!when it was his first day of school, but they visited him after school and found out that he enjoyed it. In the pop song of this episode, it is revealed that Avi can play the drums! Oonahugging Avi

characters.name: Avi's Mother
characters.description:
Avi's Motheris the mama fish caring parent ofOona's friendAvi. She is protective of her child. She is also caring towardsOona. She is mostly a light purple color. She has many spots on her back alongside her large darker purple dorsal fin. She has two white eyes with black pupils that she does not have her eyelashes and a dark purple tail.
She has only appeared in the episodes"Call a Clambulance!", and"Get Ready For School!".

characters.name: Baby T-Rex
characters.description: There are two baby t-rexs in Bubble Guppies. They appear inCan You Dig It?andRockin' Out! This baby t-rex appeared in the story segment ofCan You Dig It?. The Tricera-cops wanted to give him back to hismommywhile avoiding an angry t-rex. In the end, they realize the angry t-rex was actually the baby t-rex's mommy.

characters.name: Baby T-Rex
characters.description: There are two baby t-rexs in Bubble Guppies. They appear inCan You Dig It?andRockin' Out! This baby t-rex appeared in the story segment ofCan You Dig It?. The Tricera-cops wanted to give him back to hismommywhile avoiding an angry t-rex. In the end, they realize the angry t-rex was actually the baby t-rex's mommy.

characters.name: Ball Hog
characters.description: TheBall Hogis a wild boar that likes to take others' balls. He used to never return them untilOonaandDeemataught him to share. The only words he ever said were: "Ball Hog", "Share", & "No". He was voiced byChris Phillips.

characters.name: Ball Hog
characters.description: TheBall Hogis a wild boar that likes to take others' balls. He used to never return them untilOonaandDeemataught him to share. The only words he ever said were: "Ball Hog", "Share", & "No". He was voiced byChris Phillips.

characters.name: Ballet Pig
characters.description: The Ballet Pig annoyingMolly,GilandGoby Ballet Pig first appeared inOur Great PlayHe had singing line, it was "Ballet is one of my favourite things". And he made a second appearance inThe Farmers Song. He sangGil's line which got him frustrated.

characters.name: Ballet Pig
characters.description: The Ballet Pig annoyingMolly,GilandGoby Ballet Pig first appeared inOur Great PlayHe had singing line, it was "Ballet is one of my favourite things". And he made a second appearance inThe Farmers Song. He sangGil's line which got him frustrated.

characters.name: Baron von Bland
characters.description: Baron von Bland is a minor character and he appeared inTaste Buddies!, Serving as the main villain. He is voiced by John Waters. He was the greedy leader and ruler of a town formerly called Bland Land. In the episode, when Molly and Gil made the way to Bland Land, Baron Von Bland seized the truck as they made their way in. In addition, Molly and Gil made a fruit salad. However, this did not work well. It does not last long until Baron von Bland realizes his mistake. He tried a sandwich with his favorite bread (bland bread). After one bite, he says it's tasty. He then apologizes to everyone and decides to change the name from Bland Land to Tasty Town. characters.name: Bats
characters.description: TheBatsare a large group of bats who live underground inside theCavern Realm. They, like most creatures in Bubbledom, have the ability to speak. They appears in episodeThe Puppy And The Ring! characters.name: Bear
characters.description: Bear is an animal who appeared in the story segments ofThe Sizzling Scampinis!andThe Unidentified Flying Orchestra!. InThe Unidentified Flying Orchestra!, he lives in Bear Valley. He stoleMolly,GobyandOona's musical instruments because he wanted to make music.

characters.name: Beep
characters.description: Beepis the little duckling who can't fly, and Molly and Gil feel it's their job to help him. He is named for the sound he makes. Beep has only appeared so far in the episode "Bubble Duckies!". Beep is a purple duck with a white underbelly, yellow beak, large eyes and purple wings. Bubble Duckies! is Beep's only appearance so far. He is the smallest member of the duck family and is trying to fly as hard as he can but couldn't. During the Wings Over Bubbletucky Air Show, he tried to fly again but failed to do so. But when his family got lost in a storm could, it was up to him to fly in there and find his family.
characters.personality_section: Bubble Duckies! is Beep's only appearance so far. He is the smallest member of the duck family and is trying to fly as hard as he can but couldn't. characters.name: Big Bad Ogre
characters.description: The Ogreis a nasty-looking ceature from the storybook segment The Royal Magicians from the episodeBubble-Cadabra! The ogre has green skin, small black eyes, brown hair and two large horns that curve downward towards his head. He has a frightening personality that scares evenMr. Grouper! He is so frightening, he even scares himself when he looks in the mirror! However, given a closer look, all the ogre really wants to do is perform magic acts.
